title: chamaemelum nobile var. aureum
intro: Chamaemelum nobile var. aureum, also known as Golden Chamomile, is a variant of the popular Chamomile plant, characterized by its bright yellow flowers. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues, calm anxiety, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Golden Chamomile include promoting relaxation, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Golden Chamomile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or used in essential oil form to harness its medicinal properties.
